import io
import string
import list

let s = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(s)

mut evens: List<Int> = []
mut odds: List<Int> = []
mut start = -1
mut i = 0

while i < n + 1
  mut is_ws = false
  if i == n
    is_ws = true
  else
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        is_ws = true
      end
    when None
      is_ws = true
    end
  end

  if is_ws
    if start >= 0
      let tok = string.substring(s, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        if v % 2 == 0
          evens = list.push(evens, v)
        else
          odds = list.push(odds, v)
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      start = -1
    end
  else
    if start < 0
      start = i
    end
  end

  i = i + 1
end

mut ev_str = "evens="
mut first_e = true
for v in evens
  if first_e
    ev_str = "#{ev_str}#{v}"
    first_e = false
  else
    ev_str = "#{ev_str} #{v}"
  end
end
println(ev_str)

mut od_str = "odds="
mut first_o = true
for v in odds
  if first_o
    od_str = "#{od_str}#{v}"
    first_o = false
  else
    od_str = "#{od_str} #{v}"
  end
end
println(od_str)
